revision.comment: Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: remove obsolete category Collapse templates
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23176857634|manual triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Collapsible_templates here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Collapsible_templates for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{Helpbox
 |templatename = Collapsible templates
 |name = Collapsible templates
 |bodyclass = vcard

 |list1 = {{aligned table|fullwidth=y|rightleft=y|col1style=font-weight:bold;
   |Help:     |[[Help:Collapsing|Collapsing]]
   |Guideline:|[[:en:MOS:COLLAPSE|Hidden content]]
  }}

 |group2 = [[WP:Mainspace|Article namespace]]
 |list2 = {{plainlist|1=
* {{tl|collapse}}
* {{tl|collapsible list}}
* {{hlist|{{tl|collapse top}}|{{tl|collapse bottom}}}}
* {{tl|hidden}}
* {{hlist|{{tl|hidden begin}}|{{tl|hidden end}}}}
}}
 |group3 = [[Wikipedia:Infobox|Infoboxes]]
 |list3 = {{plainlist|1=
* {{tl|collapsed infobox section begin}}
* {{tl|collapsed infobox section end}}
}}
 |group4 = [[Wikipedia:Navigation template|Navigation templates]]
 |list4 = {{plainlist|1=
* {{tl|sidebar with collapsible lists}}
* {{tl|navbox with collapsible groups}}
}}
 |group5 = [[Help:Talk pages|Talk namespace]]
 |list5 = {{plainlist|1=
* {{tl|hidden archive top}}
* {{tl|hidden archive bottom}}
}}
}}<noinclude>
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
